CustomField.description: The Status picklist value assigned to a Recurring Donation when it is automatically closed by Status Automation after the configured number of days without expected donations. Must match an existing Status picklist value mapped to a Closed state. Works with the Status Automation Days for Closed setting. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status value for Recurring Donations automatically closed by Status Automation. Must match a Status picklist value mapped to a Closed state.
CustomField.label: Status Automation Closed Value
